title: ChangeOfHand
description: This mod helps you change the position of your hand in Minecraft. You can select your desired key from the Controls section. The default key is "H".
body:
# ChangeOfHand
![This Key Replacement Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec2fd311fc7e2c168a38eb91089fd6c5a8cec587.jpeg)
Instant Key Assignment Enabled: No need to navigate through complex menus. Assign a single key in your control settings and instantly change positions.

Improved Visibility: Move your hand position to the right or left to clear your field of view, perfect for players and content creators who want a cleaner UI.

Seamless Integration: Designed to work perfectly with the original version of Minecraft and most modded environments without causing frame drops or visual glitches.

Immersive Experience: Customize how your character visually interacts with the world, adding a more personalized and immersive feel to your adventures.

How to Use
Install the mod and launch Minecraft.

Go to Options > Controls > Key Assignments.

Find the "Hand Position" category and assign your preferred key.

Press the key in-game to instantly change your appearance!

Technical Details
This mod focuses on client-side visual changes, meaning it does not affect server-side mechanics or game balance. This is purely an aesthetic enhancement aimed at giving players more freedom over their visual workspaces.
